title: misandra prorepens
side_effects: Misandra prorepens can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing respiratory distress in individuals with pre-existing lung conditions, causing irregular heartbeat and palpitations in those with arrhythmia, and triggering severe allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. In some cases, prolonged use of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps. Furthermore, Misandra prorepens may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants, resulting in adverse reactions. If not used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional, the plant can have severe and potentially life-threatening consequences.
